subject: DevOps
title: Anatomy of an Incident
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Anatomy of an Incident.

hook.text: 2:14 AM. The pager fires. Error rates spike 40x. The on-call has five minutes to respond.

buildup.text: An incident is an unplanned disruption needing urgent response. Severity sets the pace.

discovery.text: Phases: detection, triage, mitigation, resolution. Each has a clear goal and owner.

twist.text: Mitigate first, investigate later. A revert can restore service in minutes.

climax.text: Every minute of a major incident costs money and trust. Speed matters enormously.

punchline.text: Detect fast. Mitigate fast. Investigate after recovery.

quiz.question: What should be the first priority during an incident?
options: Mitigate impact and restore service quickly
Find the root cause before taking action
